scenes.text: The alarm goes off at 6am. You hit snooze. Just five more minutes.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a phone alarm showing 6:00 AM on a nightstand, hand reaching to hit snooze, dark bedroom, warm lamp glow, cozy blankets, cinematic

scenes.text: This time you negotiate with yourself. If I skip breakfast, I can sleep ten more minutes.
scenes.image_prompt: Person lying in bed with eyes half open, thought bubble showing mental calculations, morning light creeping through curtains, cozy and warm, cinematic

scenes.text: If I don't wash my hair, I save seven minutes. If I speed a little, I save three.
scenes.image_prompt: Split screen style showing fast-forward morning routine: skipping shower, grabbing keys, running out door, all in blur motion, cinematic energy

scenes.text: And then you check the time. It's 7:45. You needed to leave at 7:30.
scenes.image_prompt: Phone screen showing 7:45 AM, person's eyes going wide in panic, still in bed, morning sunlight flooding the room, cinematic dramatic moment

scenes.text: And somehow, you still make it. Barely. Every single day.
scenes.image_prompt: Person rushing through a door just in time, slightly disheveled but present, morning golden light, triumphant but barely, cinematic
